bird.name: Puerto Rican tody
bird.summary: The Puerto Rican tody (Todus mexicanus), locally known in Spanish as San Pedrito ("little Saint Peter"), is a bird endemic to the main isla…

relations.subject: Puerto Rican tody
relations.evidence: It is currently classified as Least Concern by the IUCN. During the past, the Puerto Rican tody suffered from human predation as it was captured as food. Currently it suffers from nest predation by introduced Indian mongooses. Other threats include habitat destruction and the transition of shaded coffee plantations into sun coffee plantations
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
